The '''New Republic General Ministry''' was a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] organization responsible for government policy, planning, information.

==Overview==
The [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] General Ministry was led by the [[First Administrator]] who answered to the [[Chief of State (New Republic)/Legends|Chief of State]] and would be appointed by the [[Ministry Council]] with the approval of the Chief of State. The [[General Ministry Cabinet]], led by the First Administrator, was formed by the heads of each of the various ministries. The Cabinet would report to the Chief of State and carry out their instructions.<ref name="Cracken" />

Serving as the umbrella bureaucratic organization of the New Republic, the General Ministry had under it all parts of the government that were not under the [[New Republic Defense Force/Legends|New Republic Defense Force]] or a council, committee, or commission of the [[New Republic Senate/Legends|New Republic Senate]]. After the [[Black Fleet Crisis]] these ministries included the [[Ministry of State (New Republic)|Ministry of State]], the [[Ministry of Finance (New Republic)|Ministry of Finance]], the [[Ministry of Commerce (New Republic)|Ministry of Commerce]], the [[Ministry of Security]], and the [[Ministry of Science (New Republic)|Ministry of Science]].<ref name="Cracken" />

Separate from the various ministries were several agencies that supervised government concerns on navigation, communications, port operations, records, facilities, and transportation. In addition to this, the [[New Republic Intelligence Service]] was placed under the General Ministry. However, the [[Director of New Republic Intelligence]] answered directly to the Chief of State, not the First Administrator.<ref name="Cracken" />

The General Ministry, like its [[Galactic Republic General Ministry|Old Republic predecessor]], also managed the [[General Ministry Institutes]]. This served as an umbrella organization that managed the funding of several centers of learning and research by the New Republic government.<ref name="Cracken" />

==History==
[[Nanaod Engh]] was the First Administrator during the [[Black Fleet Crisis]]. A close ally of Chief of State [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]], she affectionately called him "Nanny", Engh tried to convince Chief Organa Solo to "buff" up her public image. She reluctantly agreed.<ref name="Before the Storm" />
